entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum variety ICSV 112, also known as SV1, a hybrid developed by ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the institution where ICSV 112 was bred

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: Country where the sorghum variety ICSV 112 was released as SV1

entities.name: PEDIGREE SELECTION
entities.description: Breeding method used in the F2-F5 generations to develop ICSV 112

entities.name: MULTIPLE CROSS
entities.description: Breeding method involving 5 lines used in the development of ICSV 112

entities.name: BULKING
entities.description: Breeding method used in the F6 generation to develop ICSV 112

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: The characteristic of being insensitive to day length

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time to reach maturity, which is 110-120 days for ICSV 112

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The height of the plant, ranging from 1.5-1.8 m

entities.name: PANICLE MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: The physical characteristics of the panicle, described as exserted, elliptic, and semicompact

entities.name: GRAIN CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Physical properties of the grains, including medium size, light-cream color, and 100 grain weight of 2.5 g

entities.name: PERICARP THICKNESS
entities.description: The thickness of the grain pericarp, described as thin

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein in the grains, approximately 9.6%

entities.name: LYSINE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of lysine per 100 g of protein, which is 2.6%

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The average grain production of 3432 kg/ha

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The average fodder production of 11.4 t/ha

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The agricultural practice of growing two or more crops in proximity

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Crops used for intercropping with sorghum

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which intercropping is suitable
